subcodes.first_line: O descendant and scion of two noble ones! Thy letter was received, and that which thou hadst written therein was thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل و حفید دو نبیل نامه ات رسید آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی چنین است در امتحانی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @conduct in finance and business
